ORDER ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE:REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850. REQUEST GRANTED. -JUDGE DONALD S MITCHELL-
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,583.87 FILED BY LOGWOOD, INEZ AS TO DEFENDANT SHIH, SHINJIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2007 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOGWOOD, INEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHIH, SHINJIN $1,291.94 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,291.94, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $2,583.87; AND ATTRIBUTES 50% COMPARATIVE NEGLIGENCE TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
